chunks.page_summary: This page provides additional material, specifically a Modbus configuration file, for integrating Rheonics sensors with Ignition software.
chunks.extracted_text:
Phone: +1 713 234 0863

Additional Material - Ignition
Modified on: Fri, 4 Oct, 2024 at 6:23 PM

The following files are to be used together with Ignition software for integration with Rheonics Sensors.
1. Modbus-config.csv: Contains basic configuration for Rheonics Sensors when using modbus communication.
key_facts: This document provides additional material for integrating Rheonics Sensors with Ignition software.
The document was last modified on Friday, October 4, 2024, at 6:23 PM.
The Modbus-config.csv file is available for basic configuration of Rheonics Sensors.
The configuration file is intended for use when Rheonics Sensors utilize Modbus communication.
A phone number for support or inquiries is +1 713 234 0863.
